summary: The diff implements nearly all requested requirements (REQ-76 through REQ-96). All four new selectors (Camera Angle, Lighting, Environment, Composition) are added to the form, GenerationParams type, prompt logic, ImageDisplay badges, backend PoseCriteria, migration, useQueries hook, and preset save/load. The Comprehensive negative prompt preset is also added. The implementation appears complete with no significant missing requirements and no hallucinated features.
